arts.ttl: Europa League Final 2025 prize money with Man Utd or Tottenham to bank huge sum
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur will face off in Bilbao in the Europa League final, with millions of pounds on the line along with significant bragging rights

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur v Manchester United: Europa League final – live
arts.sum: Europa League updates from Bilbao; kick-off 8pm BST Read today’s edition of Football Daily | And email Scott C’mon kids, let’s stop talking this down. Because while it might be true that … … yeah, that … because while that might be true, two genuine European heavyweights are facing off in Bilbao tonight. For a proper European trophy. Never mind what it means for Champions League qualification, the size of the summer purse, the destiny of the managers … silvery shimmering glory is up for grabs here, and you can be sure that’s what every last one of the fans who have battled so hard to wind their way down to Bilbao are preoccupied with. So yes, let’s stop talking this down. Up! Up! Up! It’s the Europa League final! It’s Tottenham Hotspur! It’s Manchester United! It could well be a wild nonsensical classic!!! Kick-off is at 9pm Basque o’clock, 8pm BST. It’s on. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Spurs fans branded 'animals' as furious Spanish locals confront supporters
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham supporters have descended on Bilbao before the Europa League final but their behaviour has stunned the locals amid reports of widespread vandalism

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand selects just one Tottenham player in his combined Spurs - Man United XI ahead of Europa League final
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester United are set to lock horns in the Europa League final on Wednesday afternoon. Tottenham and Manchester United have both struggled...

arts.ttl: Fans hit out at 'classless and pathetic' Spurs 'bullies' who drenched Man United supporters in beer ahead of Europa League final
arts.sum: A group of Tottenham fans have been branded 'classless and disgusting' on social media after they were seen pouring beer over Man United supporters ahead of Wednesday's final.

arts.ttl: Tottenham force Man Utd into kit change hours before Europa League final
arts.athr: newsdesk@walesonline.co.uk (Mathew Davies, Daniel Orme, Husmukh Kerai)
arts.sum: Manchester United will be forced to make a kit change for Wednesday's Europa League final against Tottenham as both sides look to secure a spot in next season's Champions League

arts.ttl: Rumour now coming from Manchester United should make Arsenal desperate for Tottenham to win the Europa League - opinion
arts.sum: Arsenal fans are presumably hoping to see Manchester United beat Tottenham in the UEFA Europa League final. The Gunners and Spurs are bitter rivals, with...

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Man United: Which team do Gary Neville, Roy Keane think will win the Europa League final?
arts.sum: Former Manchester United captains Gary Neville and Roy Keane back the Red Devils to overcome Tottenham Hotspur in the final of the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Meet the Man United and Spurs WAGs ahead of the Europa League final: From the wife who paid for her husband's early dates because he was a skint teenager, a former Miss France and the partner who is a qualified doctor
arts.sum: The Europa League final provides an opportunity for one of Tottenham Hotspur or Manchester United to salvage a Champions League place from what has been a forgettable season.

arts.ttl: Europa League final: Where Spurs v Man Utd will be won and lost
arts.sum: No player in Europa League history has made as many assists (19) or direct goal involvements (46) as Man Utd captain Bruno Fernandes . Spurs and Man Utd will put their nightmare domestic campaigns to one side in Bilbao on Wednesday evening in one of the biggest crossroads matches we have seen in years.
